activities.title: Readiness confirmation warm-up
activities.expected_evidence: One short response per intervention group confirming the diagnosed prerequisite need.
activities.rationale: Confirm priority 1 before instruction: score=0.5992; prevalence=0.1250 (5/40); downstream_impact=0.9167; lesson_urgency=0.8500; diagnostic_confidence=1.0000

activities.title: Guided prerequisite repair
activities.expected_evidence: A worked example and guided problem showing the prerequisite strategy.
activities.rationale: Allocate the longest guided block to priority 1 (skill_ratio_proportion_basics).

activities.title: Intervention-group target practice
activities.expected_evidence: Two target-skill responses per student, tagged to the assigned intervention group.
activities.rationale: Reconnect priority 2 (skill_fraction_multiplication) to the current lesson target.

activities.title: Near-transfer exit evidence
activities.expected_evidence: One independent near-transfer response distinguishing immediate success from transfer.
activities.rationale: Capture comparable evidence for the next diagnostic and teacher review cycle.
